tabs.label: Bio
tabs.heading: Biography — Sreevatsa RAVIKANTH
tabs.text: French Engineer specializing in Bioinformatics and Artificial Intelligence.
bullets: Highest Education Level: [MEng, École Centrale d'Électronique Paris, 2020 - 2025]

tabs.label: Education
tabs.heading: Education
tabs.text: A qualified engineer with an international background, shaped by several academic exchange programmes and a strong scientific grounding.
bullets: Diploma: [Engineering Degree (MSc equivalent), École Centrale d'Électronique Paris, 2020 - 2025]
International exchanges: [University of Verona (2024), OMNES London School (2022)]
Diploma: [Scientific Baccalaureate Specialization Mathematics & Earth and Life Sciences (SVT), Lycée Teilhard de Chardin, 2017 - 2020]

tabs.label: Skills
tabs.heading: Technical Skills
tabs.text: A versatile profile, combining technical expertise, the ability to learn quickly and adaptability in multidisciplinary environments.
bullets: Languages: [French (native), Tamil (native), English (C2, TOEIC 980/990), Japanese (A1), Spanish (A1)]
Programming Languages: [Python, Java, C/C++, SQL, R, MATLAB/Octave/Scilab, Dart/Flutter, SAS, VHDL]
